offer: For construction contractors managing 5-10 projects/month, compliance gaps cause potential OSHA penalties. We automate the preparation of safety compliance checklists instead of manual checklist preparation and tracking.
problem: Difficulty in maintaining OSHA safety compliance across multiple projects.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors

Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
